description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard medicine box for Erleada, a prescription medication containing 60 mg apalutamide per film-coated tablet. The front face displays the brand name, dosage, and product description in English, with a purple and yellow color scheme and a shield-like logo. The opposite face presents similar information in Arabic, maintaining the same visual branding. One side panel provides detailed usage instructions, storage guidelines, and manufacturer information in English, while the other side contains additional product details in Arabic. The box is primarily white with purple and yellow accents, and the surface appears smooth and slightly glossy. The packaging is designed to be easily handled and stored, with clear labeling for identification and safety.
description: A rectangular white cardboard box for Erleada medicine, featuring purple and yellow branding, bilingual labeling, and a smooth, slightly glossy surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Erleada brand name, dosage (60 mg), product description, and a shield-like logo on a white background with purple and yellow accents.
description_view_1: This view displays the same branding and dosage information in Arabic, with the same color scheme and logo.
description_view_2: The side view contains detailed product information and instructions in Arabic, densely printed on a white background.
description_view_3: This side shows English instructions for use, storage, manufacturer details, and warnings, all in black text on a white background with purple and yellow highlights.
attribute_label_text: Erleada 60 mg Film-coated tablets Apalutamide Oral use. 120 Film-coated tablets Each film-coated tablet contains 60 mg apalutamide. Swallow the tablets whole. Read the package leaflet before use. Keep this medicine out of the sight and reach of children. Store in original package in order to protect from moisture. Store below 30°C Prescription only Discard unused contents appropriately in accordance with local requirements. Do not swallow or discard the desiccant. Manufacturer: Janssen Ortho LLC State Road 933, Km 01, Mamey Ward, Gurabo, Puerto Rico (PR) 00778, USA Marketing Authorisation Holder: Janssen Biotech, Inc. 800 Ridgeview Road Horsham, USA Janssen 2020 109555050
attribute_brand_logo: shield-like emblem with purple, yellow, and blue segments
